hero.title: Portfolio Website
hero.oneLiner: An evolving portfolio designed, implemented, audited, and refined through a multi-agent AI workflow.

context.text: This website is both a portfolio and an ongoing experiment in AI-mediated making. I set the product direction, visual language, content, and acceptance criteria, then work across Antigravity, Codex, and Claude to plan changes, implement them, critique the result, and verify the live experience. The interesting part is not that AI writes code; it is how a human keeps intent, taste, factual accuracy, and quality control coherent across many agent-assisted iterations.

bullets: React 19 and TypeScript on Vite for a fast, component-driven single-page application
Framer Motion and a custom timeline system for the portfolio's zoom, scroll, and modal interactions
Structured JSON content for project case studies, career history, and writing
A multi-agent workflow spanning Google Antigravity, OpenAI Codex, and Anthropic Claude
Production builds, browser screenshots, keyboard checks, accessibility audits, and performance verification after meaningful changes

decisions.decision: Multi-agent collaboration vs one AI assistant
decisions.why: Different agents are useful for different modes of work: implementation, critique, research, browser verification, and long-running refactors.
decisions.tradeoff: The human has to preserve context, reconcile conflicting suggestions, and remain accountable for the final result.

decisions.decision: Custom interaction system vs a conventional portfolio template
decisions.why: The timeline, cutting-mat hero, and layered project stories make the portfolio itself evidence of product and interaction thinking.
decisions.tradeoff: A distinctive interface demands more testing, performance work, and accessibility care than a standard scrolling site.

worked: Rapid iteration on design and content.
Using multiple agents made critique and verification part of the build loop instead of an afterthought.
Automated builds, screenshots, and browser checks made ambitious interaction changes safer to ship.
didnt: Agent output still drifts without clear product intent, source-of-truth content, and explicit verification.

outcome.text: The result is a responsive portfolio that serves as a living case study in human-agent collaboration. It shows how AI can expand the amount of design, engineering, auditing, and iteration one person can coordinate while keeping authorship grounded in intent and judgment.

reflection.text: Building this portfolio reinforced that the scarce skill in an AI-mediated workflow is not typing code. It is translating intent into constraints, recognizing when the output is wrong, and carrying a coherent point of view through many rounds of implementation and critique.

skills.label: Multi-Agent Workflows
skills.description: Coordinating Antigravity, Codex, and Claude across planning, implementation, critique, and verification.

skills.label: React + TypeScript
skills.description: A typed component system for complex interactive portfolio states.

skills.label: Vite + Framer Motion
